content:
# BP log

Borderline. Cut back on the gas station jerky.

- 2026-01-08: 138/88, AM
- 2026-01-22: 136/86, AM
- 2026-02-19: 140/90, after a long haul
- 2025-10-03: 134/85, AM
- 2025-12-10: 137/87, Pilot in Athens

# Weight log

5'10". Trying to stay under 235.

- 2026-01-10: 237 lbs
- 2026-02-14: 235 lbs
- 2026-03-20: 238 lbs (too much Love's pizza)
- 2025-11-01: 234 lbs
- 2025-12-14: 233 lbs

# CPAP supply receipts

Restwell Medical Supply. After insurance ~$45/mo.

- 2026-03-04: P30i nasal pillow cushions x2 + monthly filter ,  $44.10
- 2025-10-01: monthly filter ,  paid by ins
- 2025-11-05: full mask (P30i, 3-mo) + filter ,  $46.80
- 2025-12-01: filter + cushions x2 ,  $45.20

# CPAP reorder checklist

ResMed AirSense 11, P30i. Restwell.

- [ ] Filter ,  every month
- [ ] Nasal pillow cushion ,  every 2 weeks
- [ ] Full mask ,  every 3 months (next: Aug)
- Call Restwell: cushions due again

# myAir compliance

App says I'm good. Dr Cho reviews it.

- Avg use ~7.2 hrs/night last 30 days
- AHI holding around 2-3 (was 22 before)
- Seal mostly green, P30i pillows fine
- No nights missed this week

# Dr Cho visit notes

Sleep clinic, Jan 2026.

- Apnea moderate, diagnosed Oct 2021, AHI was 22
- CPAP working, keep it up nightly
- BP borderline 138/88 ,  watch salt, walk more
- No meds for now, recheck BP next visit

# I-65 truck stop ratings

Birmingham to Nashville run.

- Exit 328 Athens Pilot: showers 4/5 clean, parking tight after 8pm, food ok
- Exit 6 Ardmore TN Love's: showers 5/5, lots of parking, good chicken
- Exit 212 Clanton: parking 3/5, skip the diner
- Exit 318 Decatur Love's: solid all around

# I-20 truck stop ratings

Birmingham to Atlanta.

- Exit 168 Pell City Pilot: showers 4/5, parking decent
- Exit 158 Leeds Love's: showers 3/5 (wait), food 4/5
- Exit 181 Anniston: parking 2/5, loud overnight
- Exit 162 Moody: clean, quiet, good stop for sleep
